From I-HY_2022_14-ACC-00: "B12 PRreocjoevcetryMaofn aMgeorn’esyPDouwe rtso Client 4 4 5 5 5   
B3 Changing Scope before issue of Defects Certificate after Completion   
B4 Right of Client to Determine for Convenience   
B5 Not Used
Section C – Assignment and Subcontracting" From C-2025-01-01_BIM_CDCP: "(1) BIM Models are listed in this Appendix PS.[X] of the PS. The Contractor shall refer to Section 3a.1 of the Scope on the use of the BIM Contents."
reasoning: The tender clause B12 appears to be garbled or corrupted (e.g., 'PRreocjoevcetryMaofn aMgeorn’esyPDouwe rtso Client 4 4 5 5 5'), making its actual subject matter unclear. The surrounding context references scope changes (B3), termination for convenience (B4), and Section C on Assignment and Subcontracting, but B12 itself contains no intelligible content that can be matched to any of the provided BIM-related standard candidates. All candidates (1, general, 2) pertain specifically to BIM models, file formats, and scope exclusions related to digital modeling, which do not align with the apparent contractual topics in Section B (e.g., defects certificate, scope change, termination). Given the unreadable nature of B12 and lack of thematic overlap with BIM content, no candidate is relevant.

From I-HY_2022_14-ACC-00: "# F8 Intellectual Property Rights
1) The Contractor shall be fully responsible for its design under the contract (including the Contractor’s Design and Cost Savings Design) as well as the general performance of the contract. The Contractor shall not infringe any Intellectual Property Rights of any person, whether or not the design (including the Contractor’s Design or Cost Savings Design) or any machine, work, method or material or anything whatsoever required for any works is developed, adopted" From C-2025-01-01_BIM_CDCP: "(1) BIM Models are listed in this Appendix PS.[X] of the PS. The Contractor shall refer to Section 3a.1 of the Scope on the use of the BIM Contents."
reasoning: The STANDARD clause addresses BIM model references and directs the Contractor to a specific section on BIM usage. The TENDER clause exclusively covers Intellectual Property Rights related to design and materials, with no mention of BIM models, BIM content, or reference to Appendix PS.[X] or Section 3a.1. There is no overlap in subject matter.
